statistics.name: points
statistics.description: The number of points scored.

statistics.name: fieldGoals
statistics.description: Field Goal makes and attempts.

statistics.name: freeThrows
statistics.description: Free Throw makes and attempts.

statistics.name: assists
statistics.description: The number of times a player who passes the ball to a teammate in a way that leads to a score by field goal, meaning that he or she was "assisting" in the basket. There is some judgment involved in deciding whether a passer should be credited with an assist.

statistics.name: turnovers
statistics.description: The number of times a player loses possession to the other team.

statistics.name: minutes
statistics.description: The total number of minutes played.

statistics.name: assistTurnoverRatio
statistics.description: The average number of assists a player or team records per turnover

statistics.name: rebounds
statistics.description: The total number of rebounds (offensive and defensive).

statistics.name: defensiveRebounds
statistics.description: The number of times when the defense obtains the possession of the ball after a missed shot by the offense.

statistics.name: offensiveRebounds
statistics.description: The number of times when the offense obtains the possession of the ball after a missed shot.

articles.headline: Stanford's Chisom Okpara to miss rest of season with injury
articles.description: Stanford basketball has announced that Chisom Okpara will miss the rest of the season due to a lower extremity injury.

articles.headline: Joe Lunardi's men's Bracketology March Madness watch guide
articles.description: The gap between the 1- and 2-seeds; how Texas affects the field; and more bracket-impacting games to watch.

images.name: Chendall Weaver, Dailyn Swain [1296x729]
images.caption: Texas' tournament status depends on the outcome of tonight's game at Kentucky.

images.name: Vanderbilt - NL [1296x729]
images.caption: Vanderbilt -- which had entered last week undefeated -- fell in last week's projections. Can the Commodores hold steady as a 3-seed after tonight's game at Arkansas?

articles.headline: Expected winter storm has some leagues reshuffling schedules
articles.description: An expected major winter weather system is prompting a reshuffling of games this week and threatens to wreak havoc on the weekend schedule.

articles.headline: Charles Bediako gets TRO for Alabama return in NCAA lawsuit
articles.description: Charles Bediako, a former Alabama standout who entered the NBA draft in 2023, has been granted a temporary restraining order to return to the team, a judge ruled Wednesday.

images.name: Brandon Miller and Charles Bediako connect for alley-oop
images.caption: Brandon Miller and Charles Bediako connect for alley-oop

articles.headline: UNC's 'Carolina North' going forward amid hoops arena question
articles.description: North Carolina is going forward with plans to develop an off-campus expansion for academic, research, residential and mixed-use retail projects. It's too soon to say whether it will include a new arena for the university's men's basketball program.

images.name: Dean Smith Center midcourt logo [600x400] - Copy

articles.headline: Reranking men's college basketball Freshman of the Year contenders
articles.description: Darryn Peterson has finally entered the top 10, along with two other players. Cameron Boozer remains No. 1.

images.name: Darryn Peterson gets the steal and the basket for Kansas
images.caption: Darryn Peterson gets the steal and the basket for Kansas.
